//: MyMoolah Treasury Platform — Codespaces port-visibility defaults.
//1: This file exists ONLY to make the backend (3001) and frontend (3000) ports start
//2: with visibility='public' on every Codespace rebuild/restart. Without this, GitHub
//3: defaults forwarded ports to 'private', which silently breaks cross-origin fetches
//4: between the two ports and surfaces as a misleading 'CORS / no Access-Control-Allow-
//5: Origin' error in the browser (the preflight is actually being 302-redirected by the
//6: Codespaces proxy to github.com/login because of the missing session cookie).
//7: Intentionally minimal: no image, no features, no postCreateCommand — GitHub falls back
//8: to its default universal dev image and leaves all existing project tooling intact.
name: MyMoolah Backend (Codespaces)
